title: Villager Protector
description: Disables player attacks on villagers to prevent accidental hits.
body:
📝 **Long Description:**


This mod prevents players from accidentally hitting villagers by disabling all direct attacks on them.
Whether you're trading, exploring, or just walking in a village, you no longer have to worry about harming villagers by mistake.
![Disabled](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a28c5a1647a1741d8b8700cc150ccb605c5efc53.png)

![Enabled](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2d788b34cdbf7e75c752fba666288ae7c7e4654_0.webp)
⚙️ **Features:**

•
Stops players from hitting villagers even when swinging accidentally  
•
Works in both singleplayer and multiplayer  
•
 Requires installation on both client and server  
 
---
ℹ️ Info:  
✅ Mod Loader: Forge / NeoForge / Fabric
✅ Minecraft Version: 1.20.1  
🔁 Side: Client + Server required  
🧪 Built using MCreator
